mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of instances where FEDFUNDS < 0.5%

mechanism_narrative: Strong quarterly GDP growth indicates robust economic expansion, which drives corporate earnings and equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: GDPC1 growth exceeds 3% but SPX 60d returns are negative in > 40% of cases

mechanism_narrative: High inflation (CPIAUCSL) combined with low interest rates (FEDFUNDS) signals central bank inaction on price pressures, creating uncertainty that drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are positive when CPIAUCSL > 2.5% and FEDFUNDS < 1%

mechanism_narrative: Strong job growth (PAYEMS) combined with high unemployment (UNRATE) indicates labor market frictions that boost wage inflation, creating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns are positive when PAYEMS > 150k and UNRATE > 5%

mechanism_narrative: Strong housing starts (HOUST) indicate resilient consumer demand, which drives corporate revenue growth and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are negative when HOUST > 1500

mechanism_narrative: Strong industrial production (INDPRO) indicates robust manufacturing activity, which drives corporate earnings and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns are negative when INDPRO rises > 1% month-over-month

mechanism_narrative: High consumer spending (RSAFS) combined with strong housing demand (HOUST) indicates sustained economic momentum, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are negative when RSAFS > 600k and HOUST > 1400

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in unemployment (UNRATE) signals tight labor markets that drive wage inflation, creating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns are positive when UNRATE < 4%
